summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ISCO INSEE coding matrix integration. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified ISCO search suggestions with code badges, fiche headers with ISCO codes and groupe labels, and Rechercher button functionality.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue (pre-existing)

seed_data_creation: ISCO matrix already imported (5853 entries, 425 unique codes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ISCO INSEE coding matrix integration fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/referentiel/isco/import (idempotent), GET /api/referentiel/isco/stats, GET /api/referentiel/isco/lookup?metier=, GET /api/referentiel/explorer/search?q= (enriched with ISCO), GET /api/referentiel/explorer/stats (includes isco_metiers/isco_codes), POST /api/referentiel/explorer/generate (enriches with ISCO code). Frontend: ExplorateurView shows ISCO code badges in search suggestions (data-testid='suggestion-{i}'), fiche header shows ISCO badge (data-testid='isco-code-badge') with code and groupe label, feminine form displayed. Auth uses localStorage keys with 'reactif_' prefix.

backend_apis: GET /api/referentiel/isco/stats - returns imported=true, total=5853, codes_uniques=425, groupes breakdown (PASSED)
GET /api/referentiel/isco/lookup?metier=Conseiller en insertion professionnelle - returns code 2423 (PASSED)
GET /api/referentiel/explorer/search?q=infirmier - returns ISCO results with code_isco and groupe_isco (PASSED)
POST /api/referentiel/explorer/generate - returns code_isco and isco_info in cached/generated fiches (PASSED)
